title: Trilegal advises Continuum Green Energy on securing $67.5 million from Just Climate
description: Continuum Green Energy Limited has raised $67.5 million from Just Climate and one of its limited partners.Trilegal acted for Continuum Green Energy and Continuum Green Energy Holdings Limited on this fundraise.The transaction was led by Rahul Chugh (Partner), Siddhant Maheshwari (Senior Associate), Kriti Chatrath (Senior Associate) and Navya Bhayana (Associate).Amit Khansaheb (Partner) provided strategic inputs on the transaction.Amit Khansaheb, Rahul ChughThe fundraise follows a previous invest
